candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A Lewis diagram of the hydrogen phosphate ion is shown below. Based on this diagram, which of the atoms would have a negative formal charge?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
磷酸氢离子的Lewis结构如下所示:

$$
\begin{array}{cccc}
&&\ddots&\\
&&\overset{\ominus}{\vphantom{\rlap{$\,\overset{\ominus}{\vphantom{H}}$}}}&&\\
\overset{+}{\vphantom{\rlap{$\,\overset{+}{\vphantom{H}}$}}}\qquad\underset{\smash{\overset{+}{\vphantom{\rlap{$\,\overset{+}{\vphantom{H}}$}}}}}{H}\qquad&\overset{\ominus}{\vphantom{\rlap{$\,\overset{\ominus}{\vphantom{H}}$}}}&\qquad\overset{\ominus}{\vphantom{\rlap{$\,\overset{\ominus}{\vphantom{H}}$}}}&\qquad\overset{\ominus}{\vphantom{\rlap{$\,\overset{\ominus}{\vphantom{H}}$}}}\\
&&\mathrm{P}&\\
&&\ddots&
\end{array}
$$

基于该Lewis结构图,哪些原子会有正式电荷?
A. P
B. H
C. O$_y$
D. O$_z$
metadata.explanation_zh: 形式电荷是通过从一个原子在路易斯结构中的价电子数减去其被指派的电子数来计算的。对于一个原子,孤对电子被视为两个被指派的电子,任何类型的键被视为一个被指派的电子(单键为一个,双键为两个,等等)。通过为所识别的原子构建形式电荷表,可以显示在所识别的原子中,只有氧原子($O_z$)会有负的形式电荷,如所提供的图像所示:https://img.apstudy.net/ap/chemistry/cr20/0445_Image_0002.jpg

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The question clearly asks which labeled atom in the Lewis diagram carries a negative formal charge, and the diagram is legible enough to identify the labeled oxygens and determine that the singly bonded non-protonated oxygen (Oz) is the negative one.
